prompt: Design a new mobile app icon for a 'SmartRead' app. The design should use the 'bookmark' icon in the image for reference, adapting it into a polished and modern app icon format.
prompt_refined: Generate a new mobile app icon for a 'SmartRead' application. The icon should visually adapt the black bookmark outline with the integrated plus sign from image 1 into a polished, modern app icon format. The bookmark element, including its unique top-right plus sign, should be the central and primary feature of the icon. Design the icon with clean, crisp vector graphics, suitable for a contemporary mobile operating system interface, ideally presented within a rounded square shape.
objects: Plus sign (integrated into the top-right of the bookmark outline, from image 1)
